items.title_en: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.desc_en: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.desc_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title_en: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.desc_en: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.desc_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title_en: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
items.title_zh: 在桑给巴尔死亡的美国影响者的伴侣作为证人向警方讲话
items.desc_en: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.
items.desc_zh: 警方称阿什莉·罗宾逊（Ashly Robinson，网名阿什莉·杰娜）在试图自杀后死亡。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: CarMax, Robinhood, Credo Technology, Wells Fargo & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：CarMax、Robinhood、Credo Technology、Wells Fargo 等
items.desc_en: Here are the names making headlines in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 以下是午盘交易中成为头条新闻的名字。

items.title_en: There’s a bottom in place for software stocks after horrid start to 2026, says BTIG
items.title_zh: BTIG 表示，在 2026 年糟糕的开局之后，软件股已经触底
items.desc_en: This has not been a kind year for software stocks, but investors in the beaten-down group may soon get some relief.
items.desc_zh: 对于软件股来说，今年并不是一个好年头，但遭受重创的投资者可能很快就会松一口气。

items.title_en: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
items.title_zh: 从反垄断障碍到机票价格，美联航合并意味着什么
items.desc_en: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，联合航空首席执行官斯科特·柯比今年早些时候曾与特朗普政府官员提出了合并的可能性。

items.title_en: Accusers seek justice after unwanted explicit messages from Congressman Eric Swalwell
items.title_zh: 国会议员埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔发出不受欢迎的明确信息后，原告寻求正义
items.desc_en: He denies claims of sexual assault but admits " mistakes" and says he will resign.
items.desc_zh: 他否认性侵犯指控，但承认“错误”并表示将辞职。

items.title_en: CEOs are betting AI will augment work rather than displace all workers
items.title_zh: 首席执行官们押注人工智能将增强工作能力，而不是取代所有工人
items.desc_en: Panelists at the Semafor World Economy conference said artificial intelligence can supplement the work that's already done, improving its quantity and quality.
items.desc_zh: Semafor 世界经济会议的小组成员表示，人工智能可以补充已经完成的工作，提高其数量和质量。

items.title_en: More U.S.-Iran peace deal talks are in discussion, White House says
items.title_zh: 白宫称更多美伊和平协议谈判正在讨论中
items.desc_en: Traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remains at a trickle, despite President Donald Trump proclaiming that a ceasefire with Iran depended on it reopening.
items.desc_zh: 尽管唐纳德·特朗普总统宣称与伊朗的停火取决于该海峡的重新开放，但通过霍尔木兹海峡的交通仍然很少。

items.title_en: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
items.title_zh: JD万斯在压倒性失败后为支持“伟人”欧尔班的竞选活动辩护
items.desc_en: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.
items.desc_zh: 这位美国副总统表示，匈牙利领导人是一位“伟大的人”，做得“非常好”，但他确信自己可以与彼得·马扎尔合作。

items.title_en: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
items.title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
items.desc_en: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
items.desc_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

items.title_en: Blackstone’s Joan Solotar says investors should separate ‘signal from the noise’ in private credit
items.title_zh: Blackstone 的 Joan Solotar 表示，投资者应区分私人信贷中的“信号与噪音”
items.desc_en: Joan Solotar, global head of Blackstone Private Wealth, said the capital flight from private credit isn't justified by the likely returns and potential losses.
items.desc_zh: Blackstone Private Wealth 全球主管 Joan Solotar 表示，从可能的回报和潜在损失来看，私人信贷的资本外逃并不合理。

items.title_en: Oracle jumps for a second day, Bloom Energy soars 20% on AI data center power deal
items.title_zh: 甲骨文连续第二天上涨，Bloom Energy 因人工智能数据中心电力交易而飙升 20%
items.desc_en: Oracle stocks bounced as software shares continued to recover and the company expanded a capacity deal with Bloom Energy.
items.desc_zh: 随着软件股持续复苏以及该公司扩大与 Bloom Energy 的产能交易，甲骨文股价出现反弹。

items.title_en: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
items.title_zh: 中国称美国封锁伊朗港口不负责任且危险
items.desc_en: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".
items.desc_zh: 中国是伊朗石油的最大买家，表示美国的海上封锁破坏了“本已脆弱的停火”。

items.desc_en: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.

items.title_zh: 美联储提名人沃什的文件详述了巨额财富，远远超过了过去的主席

items.title_en: Cameroon separatists to pause fighting ahead of Pope visit
items.title_zh: 喀麦隆分裂分子在教皇访问前暂停战斗
items.desc_en: The separatists say their decison reflects responsibility, restraint and respect for human dignity.
items.desc_zh: 分离主义者表示，他们的决定体现了责任、克制和对人类尊严的尊重。

items.title_en: French woman, 86, held by ICE after moving to US to reunite with long-lost love
items.title_zh: 86岁法国女子移居美国与失散多年的爱人团聚后被ICE拘留
items.desc_en: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse told French media he is worried for his mother's frail health as she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.
items.desc_zh: 养老金领取者玛丽-泰雷兹的儿子告诉法国媒体，他担心母亲虚弱的健康状况，因为她被拘留在路易斯安那州的ICE中心。

items.title_zh: 土耳其一名前学生在高中开枪，造成十六人受伤
items.desc_en: Students and teachers are among those who were injured in the attack in the country's south-east.
items.desc_zh: 在该国东南部的袭击中受伤的包括学生和教师。

items.title_en: Retrial over death of Argentina legend Maradona to begin
items.title_zh: 阿根廷传奇球星马拉多纳死亡重审开始
items.desc_en: The first trial - which saw members of Maradona's medical team accused of poor care - collapsed after a judge let cameras into the court.
items.desc_zh: 第一次审判——马拉多纳的医疗队成员被指控护理不善——在法官让摄像机进入法庭后宣告失败。

items.desc_zh: 目前正在对周六拉斐里城堡 25 人死亡的原因进行调查。
